verification_notes: Vision-verified all 53 spell names, resist types, and descriptions against Mythras Core PDF p.166-177 page images. All entries match source.

invocation.description: Represents a sorcerer's ability to successfully cast spells learned from a particular source. Each incidence of Invocation must be assigned to a specific type or wellspring of sorcery (school, grimoire, mentor, etc.).

shaping.description: The method used to change the parameters of a sorcery spell. Never rolled against when casting — acts as a governor to limit the degree of modification. Only one Shaping skill needed regardless of how many schools known.

aig_adaptation.note: Per AiG p.60 overview: Invocation is replaced with whichever Rune Affinity is linked to that spell, further modified by the Four Principles (Combine/Separate, Command, Summon/Dismiss, Tap). Shaping is replaced by the sorcerer's Law Rune affinity.

memorisation_limit.description: A sorcerer may only memorise a number of spells up to the value of his INT characteristic.

starting_spells.note: Starting spells for chargen = Invocation/20 (Core). In AiG adaptation, Invocation → Rune Affinity, so starting spells = Rune Affinity/20. At Dedicated rank with ~50% Rune Affinity, this gives ~3 spells.
starting_spells.school_choice: One school chosen at character creation; others can be discovered during play

casting_cost.description: Sorcerer's Magic Point Attribute is temporarily reduced by the number of Magic Points used to cast that spell until the magic is dropped or expires.
casting_cost.base_cost: 1 Magic Point per spell (before shaping additions)

shaping_parameters.description: Shaping Points may be divided amongst the following components to optimise the spell. Each point allocated increases that parameter by one step.

components.name: Combine
components.description: Permits combining multiple sorcery spells into a single casting. All conjoined spells share the same shaping components.

components.name: Duration
components.description: Default duration = POW of caster in minutes. Each shaping point extends duration (minutes → hours → days → etc.)

components.name: Magnitude
components.description: Used to penetrate magical defences or resist magical attacks

components.name: Range
components.description: Used to increase the distance a spell can be cast over

components.name: Targets
components.description: Used to increase the number of targets affected by the spell

spell_list.note: All 53 spells from Mythras Core Rulebook. Each spell with (Substance), (Creature), (Characteristic), or (Sense) requires specialisation when learned.

spells.name: Abjure (Substance/Process)
spells.description: Allows the recipient to abstain from something usually required for life, utterly removing its need (or effect) until the spell ends.

spells.name: Animate (Substance)
spells.description: Invests an inanimate object with a semblance of life, permitting it to move under its own power.

spells.name: Attract (Threat)
spells.description: Makes the recipient a scapegoat for certain harmful occurrences, drawing all incidences of its particular threat within range towards them.

spells.name: Banish
spells.description: Enables a sorcerer to dismiss a spiritual or demonic entity back to the Plane from whence it was summoned.

spells.name: Bypass Armour
spells.description: Affects objects, armaments or natural weapons so that they pass through armour, ignoring Armour Points equal to the spell's Intensity.

spells.name: Castback
spells.description: Shields the recipient from magic in a haphazard manner, with the chance that any spell cast at them may be reflected back at its caster.

spells.name: Damage Enhancement
spells.description: Augments the physical damage inflicted by an object or creature, increasing the minimum damage of a successful attack.

spells.name: Damage Resistance
spells.description: Protects an object or person against physical damage, providing Armour Points equal to the spell's Intensity.

spells.name: Diminish (Characteristic)
spells.description: Reduces a physical or mental trait of a living target, diminishing it by 2 points per Intensity of the spell.

spells.name: Dominate (Creatures)
spells.description: Grants the sorcerer psychic control over a creature of the specific species the spell affects.

spells.name: Draw (Creatures)
spells.description: Summons creatures of a specific type within range towards a target, affecting creatures up to a maximum SIZ of three times the spell's Intensity.

spells.name: Enchant (Object)
spells.description: Enables a caster to make one of their sorcery spells everlasting, at the cost of seriously reducing their magical strength.

spells.name: Enhance (Characteristic)
spells.description: Increases a physical or mental trait of a target, enhancing it by 2 points per Intensity of the spell.

spells.name: Enlarge
spells.description: Expands non-living or inanimate objects, multiplying dimensions and weight by a factor equal to the Intensity.

spells.name: Enslave (Creatures)
spells.description: Grants the sorcerer power to manipulate large numbers of targets of the same species, turning them into helpless automatons.

spells.name: Evoke
spells.description: Brings an extra-planar being to the presence of the caster; which can be anything from a demon or genie to an intangible spirit.

spells.name: Fly
spells.description: Enables the recipient to move freely through the air, granting a base Movement Rate of 6.

spells.name: Haste
spells.description: Augments the Movement Rate of whatever it is cast on, increasing it by an amount equal to the Intensity.

spells.name: Hide Life
spells.description: Conceals the recipient's soul in a specially prepared soul jar, preventing death in exchange for losing a Hit Point from every location.

spells.name: Hinder
spells.description: Reduces the Movement Rate of whatever it is cast on, slowing it by a number of metres equal to the Intensity.

spells.name: Holdfast
spells.description: Magically adheres an object to another surface. The bonding is unbreakable by normal means.

spells.name: Imprison
spells.description: Creates an invisible barrier around a person or creature, blocking it from leaving the area.

spells.name: Intuition
spells.description: Permits the sorcerer to discern the true emotions and motives of the target, as if he had made a successful Insight roll.

spells.name: Mark
spells.description: Magically tags an object with a mystical sigil so that it may be located, summoned or targeted by another spell.

spells.name: Mystic (Sense)
spells.description: Enables the caster to perceive magic using the sense of perception specified by the spell.

spells.name: Neutralise Magic
spells.description: Suppresses a single spell or miracle on a target with a Magnitude equal or less than its own.

spells.name: Palsy
spells.description: Renders a single random Hit Location completely useless, the affected area twitching and unresponsive.

spells.name: Perceive (Sense)
spells.description: Grants the recipient a new and unusual sensory perception, from Echolocation to X-Ray Vision.

spells.name: Phantom (Sense)
spells.description: Produces an illusory effect on a target, tailored to fool a specific sense.

spells.name: Portal
spells.description: Creates a magical gateway connecting two places, allowing instantaneous transportation between them.

spells.name: Project (Sense)
spells.description: Allows the recipient to send one of his senses beyond his body in the form of an astral projection.

spells.name: Protective Ward
spells.description: An augmenting spell which must be cast in association with other sorcery spells to form an extended wall of protection.

spells.name: Regenerate
spells.description: Allows the sorcerer to slowly heal injuries by accelerating natural healing, regenerating Hit Points per hour equal to the Intensity.

spells.name: Repulse (Creatures)
spells.description: The exact opposite of Draw, driving off creatures of a specific type within range of the target.

spells.name: Revivify
spells.description: Animates a dead body, creating a mindless undead automaton such as a skeleton or zombie.

spells.name: Sculpt (Substance)
spells.description: Enables a sorcerer to mould the form of a particular substance, shaping it to his will.

spells.name: Sense (Object, State or Substance)
spells.description: Utilised as a means to detect valuables, lost possessions or hidden objects from afar.

spells.name: Shapechange (to Creature)
spells.description: Morphs the physical body of the target into that of another species.

spells.name: Shrink
spells.description: Miniaturises non-living or inanimate objects, reducing dimensions and weight by a factor equal to the Intensity.

spells.name: Smother
spells.description: Slowly asphyxiates a target, starving it of air so that it collapses choking and gasping.

spells.name: Spell Resistance
spells.description: Provides protection against magic, blocking incoming spells with a Magnitude equal to or less than its own.

spells.name: Spirit Resistance
spells.description: Blocks spirits and intangible entities from coming into contact with the recipient.

spells.name: Store Manna
spells.description: Creates a temporary storage vessel for Magic Points, which can be charged and later called on to power spells.

spells.name: Summon
spells.description: Brings a non-living, inanimate object to the sorcerer, teleporting it from wherever it previously rested.

spells.name: Switch Body
spells.description: Enables a sorcerer to switch his consciousness with that of another, so that they exchange bodies.

spells.name: Tap (Characteristic)
spells.description: Drains Characteristic points from victims in order to boost the sorcerer's own levels.

spells.name: Telepathy
spells.description: Allows a sorcerer to establish mental two-way communication with a target, without the need for shared language.

spells.name: Teleport
spells.description: Enables a sorcerer to instantaneously move the recipient anywhere within the Range of the spell.

spells.name: Transfer Wound
spells.description: Allows a sorcerer to transfer physical damage from himself to the target or vice versa.

spells.name: Transmogrify (to Substance)
spells.description: Converts the base substance of a creature or object to some other material.

spells.name: Trap Soul
spells.description: Snares the spirit of a corporeal creature so that at the moment of its death, it can be trapped within a specially prepared object.

spells.name: Undeath
spells.description: Enables the sorcerer to turn the recipient into an undead monster, gaining immunity to disease, poison, fatigue and ageing.

spells.name: Wrack (Substance or Harm)
spells.description: Enables a sorcerer to harm opponents with deadly bolts or waves of sorcerous energy. Damage scales with Intensity.

schools_of_sorcery.description: Sorcery schools define which spells are available. Each school is themed around a concept or element. Example: Masters of Shadow may learn Dominate (Reptiles), Palsy, Sculpt Darkness, Smother, Teleport (via Shadows), and Wrack (Darkness). Masters of Metamorphosis may learn spells controlling the changing of things: Abjure, Diminish, Enhance, Sculpt, Shapechange, Transmogrify.
schools_of_sorcery.note_for_glorantha: In Glorantha, sorcery schools map to cults. Arkat's cult lists Invocation and Shaping as cult skills. The cult's spell list (from one-pager) defines which sorcery spells are available.
